stories.title: Shohei Ohtani Makes His 2026 Pitching Debut Tonight vs Cleveland

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Tonight: Shohei Ohtani takes the mound for the first time in 2026.

No pitch limit. No restrictions. First full start since Tommy John surgery.

7:10 PM PT at Uniqlo Field vs Cleveland.

The most anticipated start of the season. ⚾

#Dodgers #LetsGoDodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Roki Sasaki started Monday. Shohei Ohtani starts tonight. Yoshinobu Yamamoto starts Wednesday.

Per Elias: no MLB team has ever started three consecutive Japanese-born pitchers.

The Dodgers are making history three nights in a row.

#Dodgers #MLB #LetsGoDodgers

article.headline: Sasaki, Ohtani, Yamamoto: The Night Baseball History Gets Made Three Times in a Row

stories.title: Blue Jays Set MLB Record With 50 Strikeouts in Opening Series

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Toronto Blue Jays struck out 50 batters in their first 3 games.

An MLB record.

Gausman: 11 Ks on Opening Day.
Cease: 12 Ks in his Blue Jays debut.

First teammates since 1901 to each K 11+ in the team's first 2 games.

The Blue Jays rotation is FILTHY. ⚾

#BlueJays #MLB

article.headline: 50 Strikeouts in Three Games: How the Blue Jays Set an MLB Record to Open 2026

stories.title: Aaron Judge Hits First HR of 2026 — With an ABS Challenge Assist

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge went 0-for-5 on Opening Night.

Then he hit a home run in each of the next two games.

His first HR of 2026? It came after a successful ABS challenge in the same at-bat.

368 career HRs. Needs 32 more to reach 400. The chase is on. ⚾

#Yankees #MLB #AaronJudge

article.headline: Aaron Judge's First HR of 2026 Had an Unexpected Assist — And It Kicks Off a Historic Chase

stories.title: ABS Challenge System Debuts — Six Calls Overturned in First Game

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The ABS challenge system debuted in 2026 — and it immediately exposed a problem.

8 calls challenged in one game. 6 overturned.

Batters, pitchers, and catchers can now challenge ball-strike calls by tapping their cap.

Baseball just changed. Forever. ⚾

#MLB #BaseballTwitter

article.headline: The ABS Challenge System Is Here — And It Already Proved Its Point in Week 1

stories.title: Dodgers' Three-Peat Bid Gets First Test — Guardians Win 4-2 Monday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers opened 2026 with comeback wins in all 3 games vs Arizona.

Then Monday, Cleveland beat them 4-2. First loss of the year.

Parker Messick: 6 scoreless innings.

Now Ohtani pitches. The Dodgers' three-peat bid is already getting tested.

#Dodgers #MLB #LetsGoDodgers

stories.title: The 2026 Rookie Class Is Already Unprecedented — DeLauter, Murakami, and More

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
2026 rookie class, Week 1:

• Murakami (CWS): HR in first 3 games — 4th player ever
• DeLauter: HR in first 3 games
• Wetherholt, Benge: HR in MLB debuts
• Okamoto: clutch hit in walk-off debut

This might be the best rookie opening week in MLB history. ⚾

#MLB #BaseballTwitter

✅ Yankees: 3-0

Early days. Very early days. But still fun.
